text:
Owner-curated synthetic rope resources
RW Rope is the supplied synthetic-upline rope resource: https://www.rwrope.com/. The supplied directory says custom orders are accepted, but treats current custom-order availability as volatile and advises verifying it with the vendor.
ChromaKnotz is a supplied synthetic bondage-rope shop: https://chromaknotz.square.site/.
Knot Head Nylon is a supplied synthetic bondage-rope shop: https://knotheadnylon.net/.
title: Owner-curated synthetic rope resources
